$comment: The authoritative list of Stratos Games Factory agents. Swarm mode (CLAUDE.md) is the primary dispatch mechanism. Cron-based shell scripts are deprecated.

agents.name: builder
agents.description: Processes build-request issues. In swarm mode, each issue is handled by a dedicated subagent that reads the game's CLAUDE.md and opens a PR.

agents.name: council
agents.description: Reviews the week's factory activity, updates COUNCIL.md, files council-labeled issues for architectural improvements.

agents.name: qa
agents.description: Playwright smoke tests on every PR: page loads, no console errors, game container present, screenshot artifact. Zero Claude tokens.

agents.name: content
agents.description: Generates up to 5 new content ideas per game and files them as build-request issues. Never writes code.

agents.name: competitor
agents.description: Scans trending puzzle/casual games via web search, files market-intel issues with 3 specific mechanic suggestions per game.

agents.name: platform
agents.description: On ship-it release: npx cap sync, attempts gradle assembleRelease, files release-ready issue with APK/AAB links.

agents.name: product
agents.description: Analyzes player data from analytics-data issues (Ripon) or Firebase CLI. Files data-backed build-request issues with label product-data.

agents.name: monetization
agents.description: Reviews ad placement config in game code, cross-references with casual game best practices, files optimization issues with label monetization-data.

agents.name: ua
agents.description: Generates App Store/Play Store description variants, ASO keyword sets, and screenshot composition suggestions. Files ua-assets issues.
